subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance! Hearken unto the call of the Wronged One, which hath been raised from the Prison of 'Akká. Verily, He testifieth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه ان استمع ندآء المظلوم الذی ارتفع من سجن عکا انه شهد
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God
